limit.description: The maximum number of items returned.

has_more.description: Whether there are more items available after this page.

next_cursor.description: Cursor to use as `starting_after` to fetch the next page of results, or null if there are no more items.

SessionAnalyticsSummary.description: Overall session counts for the organization.

date.description: UTC date bucket in YYYY-MM-DD format.
UTC date bucket in YYYY-MM-DD format.

trigger_type.description: The type of object that triggered this event.

trigger_id.description: The ID of the object that triggered this event (e.g. a verification session or attempt ID).

created_at.description: The time the event was created.

webhook_endpoint_id.description: The ID of the webhook endpoint this delivery targets

status.description: The status of the webhook delivery

last_status_code.description: The last HTTP status code received from the endpoint, if any.

attempt_count.description: The number of attempts made to deliver the webhook

last_attempt_at.description: The time the last delivery attempt was made, if any.

redirect_url.description: Optional URL to redirect the user to after the verification session is completed. Must use https:// (http:// is only accepted for localhost in development).

required.description: Whether this field is required by the RC.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for requesting this field.

share_fields.description: Optional map of requested share fields keyed by claim key. Each entry must include `required` (boolean) and `reason` (non-empty string, max 200).

webhook_endpoint_id.description: The ID of the webhook endpoint this delivery targets

webhook_encryption_key_id.description: The ID of the encryption key used to encrypt the payload for this delivery

status.description: The status of the webhook delivery

attempt_count.description: The number of attempts made to deliver the webhook

next_attempt_at.description: The next time this delivery should be attempted, or null if ready to send.

last_status_code.description: The last HTTP status code received from the endpoint, if any.

last_attempt_at.description: The time the last delivery attempt was made, if any.

created_at.description: The time the delivery was created

updated_at.description: The time the delivery was last updated

id.description: The ID of the webhook endpoint

organization_id.description: The ID of the organization that owns this endpoint

name.description: An optional display name for the webhook endpoint.

url.description: The URL of the webhook endpoint

enabled.description: Whether the webhook endpoint is enabled

subscribed_event_types.description: The event types this endpoint is subscribed to. Supported values: verification.attempt.succeeded, verification.attempt.failed, verification.session.expired, verification.session.cancelled.

created_at.description: The time the webhook endpoint was created

updated_at.description: The time the webhook endpoint was last updated

disabled_at.description: The time the webhook endpoint was disabled, null if enabled

signing_secret.description: The webhook signing secret. This value is shown only once.

name.description: An optional display name for the webhook endpoint.

url.description: The URL of the webhook endpoint. Must use https:// (http:// is only accepted for localhost in development).

enabled.description: Whether the endpoint should be enabled immediately. Defaults to true.

subscribed_event_types.description: The event types this endpoint should receive.

id.description: The ID of the webhook encryption key

webhook_endpoint_id.description: The ID of the webhook endpoint this key belongs to

key_id.description: The key identifier, used as `kid` in the JWE header

jwk.description: The public JWK used to encrypt webhook payloads

updated_at.description: The time the key was last updated

disabled_at.description: The time the key was disabled, null if still active

jwk.description: The public JWK for encrypting webhook payloads.

algorithm.description: The JWE algorithm to use for webhook delivery.

200.description: Successful operation. Returns a list of verification sessions for the organization.

id.description: The ID of the verification session

status.description: The status of the verification session

contract_version.description: Version of the session share contract.

required.description: Whether this field must always be shared.

reason.description: Reason shown to the user for this field.

source.description: Whether the field came from defaults or RC request.

share_fields.description: Effective normalized share fields used by this session.

redirect_url.description: The URL to redirect to after the verification session is completed, if provided by the integrator.

verification_url.description: The URL that the platform should send the user to in order to complete the verification. Includes the one-shot `cancel_token` as a query parameter so the verify browser / native app can pass it back when cancelling.

cancel_token.description: One-shot token required by `POST /v1/verify/session/:id/cancel`. Returned only on session creation — store it server-side if you intend to surface a cancel link from your dashboard or email; the verify URL already includes it for browser/native cancel flows.

expires_at.description: The expiration time of the verification session

completed_at.description: The time the verification session reached a terminal state (i.e., completed, expired or cancelled), or null if not yet terminal.

created_at.description: The time the verification session was created

updated_at.description: The time the verification session was last updated

id.description: The ID of the verification attempt

session_id.description: The ID of the verification session this attempt belongs to

status.description: The status of the verification attempt

failure_code.description: The code of the failure reason

risk_score.description: The risk score of the verification attempt, between 0 and 1.

completed_at.description: The time the verification attempt reached a terminal state (i.e., succeeded, failed or cancelled)

created_at.description: The time the verification attempt was created

updated_at.description: The time the verification attempt was last updated

attempts.description: The verification attempts for the session. Only included when explicitly requested.

document_type_code.reason: Needed to know the document type code

schema.description: When true, includes the `attempts` array on the created session. Attempts will be empty on creation.

parameters.description: When true, includes the `attempts` array on the created session. Attempts will be empty on creation.
parameters.name: include_attempts
